keyPoints: Text-Based Features: Steganography in plain text messages and emails
Applications of Data Hiding: Protecting intellectual property and hiding personal data
Watermarking: Embedding a hidden message in images and audio files
Intuitive Methods: Using analogies and metaphors to remember data hiding techniques
Simple Digital Methods: Using encryption and steganography to hide data in digital images
Data Hiding in Different Media: Hiding data in music, videos, and documents
